title: Romantic Irish Ras el Hanout Colcannon Bake
description: A cultured and crispy Irish dish featuring the exotic flavors of Ras el Hanout, pressure-cooked to perfection. Perfect for a romantic evening in.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to medium-high heat.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and sauté the chopped onions until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chopped potatoes and shredded cabbage to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, until they begin to soften.
Stir in the Ras el Hanout spice blend and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the potato and cabbage mixture to the pressure cooker and add 2 cups of water.
Close the pressure cooker lid and set the valve to 'sealing'. Cook for 10-12 minutes at high pressure.
Quick-release the pressure and carefully remove the lid.
Dust the top of the colcannon with flour and sprinkle with grated cheddar cheese, if using.
Transfer the colcannon to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and Ras el Hanout spice blend, if desired.
